channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4406] conf-sanity test_32a: Upgrade from b2_4-zfs to master failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d6c0ccf4-67a0-11e3-8bcb-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_32a failed with the following error:

test_32a failed with 1

Hit following error when running conf-sanity test-32a with b2_4-zfs image.
Here is the debug log

00080000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586102:0:11498:0:(osd_index.c:1312:osd_index_it_load()) Process leaving (rc=1 : 1 : 1)
00080000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586108:0:11498:0:(osd_index.c:1267:osd_index_it_rec()) Process entered
00080000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586135:0:11498:0:(osd_index.c:1279:osd_index_it_rec()) Process leaving (rc=18446744073709551614 : -2 : fffffffffffffffe)
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586139:0:11498:0:(fld_index.c:389:fld_index_init()) Process leaving via out_it_put (rc=18446744073709551614 : -2 : 0xfffffffffffffffe)
00080000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586145:0:11498:0:(osd_index.c:107:osd_index_it_fini()) Process entered
00000020:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586153:0:11498:0:(lustre_fid.h:719:fid_flatten32()) Process leaving (rc=4099 : 4099 : 1003)
00080000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586156:0:11498:0:(osd_index.c:117:osd_index_it_fini()) Process leaving
80000000:00000010:12.0:1387588620.586159:0:11498:0:(fld_index.c:425:fld_index_init()) kfreed 'attr': 80 at ffff880319c76940.
00000020:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586162:0:11498:0:(lustre_fid.h:719:fid_flatten32()) Process leaving (rc=4099 : 4099 : 1003)
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586167:0:11498:0:(fld_index.c:432:fld_index_init()) Process leaving (rc=18446744073709551614 : -2 : fffffffffffffffe)
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586171:0:11498:0:(fld_handler.c:470:fld_server_init()) Process leaving via out_cache (rc=18446744073709551614 : -2 : 0xfffffffffffffffe)
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586175:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:102:fld_cache_fini()) Process entered
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586177:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:255:fld_cache_flush()) Process entered
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586179:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:226:fld_cache_shrink()) Process entered
80000000:00000040:12.0:1387588620.586181:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:245:fld_cache_shrink()) srv-t32fs-MDT0000: FLD cache - Shrunk by 0 entries
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586184:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:247:fld_cache_shrink()) Process leaving (rc=0 : 0 : 0)
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586186:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:262:fld_cache_flush()) Process leaving
80000000:00000040:12.0:1387588620.586188:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:114:fld_cache_fini()) FLD cache statistics (srv-t32fs-MDT0000):
80000000:00000040:12.0:1387588620.586190:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:115:fld_cache_fini())   Total reqs: 0
80000000:00000040:12.0:1387588620.586192:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:116:fld_cache_fini())   Cache reqs: 0
80000000:00000040:12.0:1387588620.586194:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:117:fld_cache_fini())   Cache hits: 0%
80000000:00000010:12.0:1387588620.586196:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:119:fld_cache_fini()) kfreed 'cache': 152 at ffff880319c6eb00.
80000000:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586199:0:11498:0:(fld_cache.c:121:fld_cache_fini()) Process leaving
00000004:00000010:12.0:1387588620.586201:0:11498:0:(mdt_handler.c:3630:mdt_fld_init()) kfreed 'ss->ss_server_fld': 152 at ffff880319c6e980.
00000004:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586204:0:11498:0:(mdt_handler.c:3632:mdt_fld_init()) Process leaving (rc=18446744073709551614 : -2 : fffffffffffffffe)
00000004:00000001:12.0:1387588620.586207:0:11498:0:(mdt_handler.c:4347:mdt_init0()) Process leaving via err_fini_stack (rc=18446744073709551614 : -2 : 0xfffffffffffffffe)
item.summary: conf-sanity test_32a: Upgrade from b2_4-zfs to master failed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment:
Found issue with #7152 fixed and made #7193 dependent on this patch:

http://review.whamcloud.com/8857

Nathaniel,
Could you have a look at this ticket? Please talk to Alex if you have questions or need more information.
Thank you!

Hmm, it seems it is failed during load FLDB into memory. According to the test results lists in http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/7193/. It seems the problem is brought in since Nov 20th. Probably related with this,
commit e84d60ea58e5d236a35eb128e73b6ca4c567373d
Author: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Date: Sun Jul 28 11:33:20 2013 +0400

LU-3489 osd-zfs: varsize index support

LFSCK needs indices with keys/values of different size.
add a support for this to osd-zfs. key/value size can't
vary within a single index object so far.

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Change-Id: I6faa730ce1f778563c1fcf43d3b50c5b62c899d9
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/7152
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nathaniel.l.clark@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>

Alex, Please comment. It is just some wild guess. Thanks.
